```python
def encodePage(inp: List[int], inpos: Tuple[int, int], thissize: int, out: List[int], outpos: Tuple[int, int]) -> None:
    tmpoutpos = outpos[0]
    tmpinpos = inpos[0]
    bestb = (1,)
    bestexcept = (1,)
    for finalinpos in range(tmpinpos + thissize, BLOCK_SIZE + 1, BLOCK_SIZE):
        getBestBFromData(inp, tmpinpos, bestb, bestexcept)
        tmpbestb = bestb[0]
        nbrexcept = bestexcept[0]
        exceptsize = 0
        remember = tmpoutpos
        tmpoutpos += 1
        if nbrexcept > 0:
            c = 0
            for i in range(BLOCK_SIZE):
                if (inp[tmpinpos + i] >> bits[tmpbestb]) != 0:
                    exceptbuffer[c + nbrexcept] = i
                    exceptbuffer[c] = inp[tmpinpos + i] >> bits[tmpbestb]
                    c += 1
            exceptsize = S9.compress(exceptbuffer, 0, 2 * nbrexcept, out, tmpoutpos)
            tmpoutpos += exceptsize
        out[remember] = tmpbestb | (nbrexcept << 8) | (exceptsize << 16)
        for k in range(0, BLOCK_SIZE + 32, 32):
            BitPacking.fastpack(inp, tmpinpos + k, out, tmpoutpos, bits[tmpbestb])
            tmpoutpos += bits[tmpbestb]
    inpos = (tmpinpos,)
    outpos = (tmpoutpos,)
```
